todo.title: Image Thumbnail Previews (Lazy Loading)
todo.description: Replace the current blocking QPixmap load in widgets.py with a lazy-loading approach. Use QTimer.singleShot(0, ...) to defer thumbnail rendering until after the card is painted. Cap thumbnail at 300x180px. Store the QPixmap on the card to avoid re-loading on every repaint.

todo.title: Video Thumbnail via ffmpeg
todo.description: Add core/thumbnailer.py: run ffmpeg subprocess to extract first frame of a video as .png into data/thumbnails/<item_id>.png. Store thumbnail path in the existing 'preview' DB column. Display thumbnail in ItemCard for video items instead of plain file path.

todo.title: Auto-cleanup of Old Captures
todo.description: Add clean_old_captures(keep=100) to storage.py — deletes .png files from data/captures/ and data/thumbnails/ AND removes DB rows beyond the N-th oldest unpinned item. Call on startup. Add 'max_captures' to settings.json (default 100) with a spinbox in the settings dialog.

todo.title: Image Viewer Popup
todo.description: Create ui/image_viewer.py: QDialog showing the full-size image with smooth scaling, a close button, and a 'Copy Image' button. Opens on single-click on the thumbnail in the card (not the whole card — double-click still copies as text path).

todo.title: Copy Image Back to Clipboard
todo.description: In image viewer, 'Copy Image' button loads the .png into QImage and puts it on QClipboard as image data (not text path). Also fix sig_copy for image items in dashboard._on_copy() to push the actual image to clipboard instead of file-path text.

todo.title: Drag & Drop to Reorder Pinned Items
todo.description: Enable QDrag reordering for pinned cards only. Add 'sort_order' INTEGER column to DB via migration. Show a drag handle (⠿) on pinned cards. On drop, update sort_order in DB. Dashboard._visible_cards() respects sort_order for pinned items.
